correction_note: Supersedes 2026-04-02 version which incorrectly declared all experiments complete. This version aligns with revised hypotheses and task plan (both updated 2026-04-03). All pilot-scale data is preliminary only.
decision_meaning: Advance to full-scale experimentation as specified in task_plan.json. Do NOT advance to paper writing — full-scale runs have not been executed.

pilot_signal_strength.rationale: 2/4 interpretable blocks show meaningful spread (0.88-2.32%); 2 blocks near chance floor (10% and ~1% accuracy); Tier 2 category pilot 9.01% (single seed, unconfirmed)

hypothesis_survival.rationale: H1 preliminary supported; H2 supported; H4 corrected and supported; H5b and H6 new/revised with pilot backing; H3 revised (feature-space pending, not falsified); no core hypothesis critically destroyed

path_to_full_result.rationale: ~54 GPU-hours well-specified in task_plan.json; clear dependency chain; Tier 2 confirmation pilot provides go/no-go gate; feature-space NC needs Tier 1 checkpoints

novelty.rationale: novelty_score=8/10; no prior work isolates ordering as sole IV; feature-space NC_2, corrected DPI, category interleaving, inverted-U magnitude all novel; Wrona et al. 2025 is closest partial overlap (medical, 2-step, no theory)

resource_efficiency.rationale: ~54 GPU-hours remaining; feasible on 4 GPUs in ~27h wall-clock; Tier 2 confirmation gate can save 18 GPU-hours if 9.01% effect doesn't survive

cand_b.note: Activation condition NOT met. cand_b activates only if full-scale Tier 1 shows all blocks with spread < 0.2%. Current evidence (0.88-2.32% in interpretable blocks) makes this extremely unlikely (<20%). Available as pivot backup.

cand_c.note: Zero-cost secondary analysis within cand_a paper using Tier 1 CIFAR-100 full runs per-class accuracy. Depends on Tier 1 full completion. Always run.

H1.name: Ordering spread > 0.3% in at least 2/4 blocks (paired t-test, p<0.05, Bonferroni corrected)
H1.evidence: 2/4 interpretable blocks above 0.5% threshold (RN18×CIFAR-100: 0.88%, ViT×CIFAR-10: 2.32%); 2 blocks near chance floor cannot be interpreted

H2.name: ViT larger absolute ordering sensitivity than CNN (interaction ANOVA p<0.05, eta-sq>0.05)
H2.evidence: ViT/CIFAR-10 = 2.32% vs. CNN/CIFAR-10 = 0.96%; ViT/CIFAR-100 = 0.25% vs. CNN/CIFAR-100 = 0.88% (reversed in low-signal block); interaction ANOVA requires 5 seeds

H3.name: Feature-space NC_2 (512-D, 10k samples, 1000 projections) Spearman rho > 0.5 with accuracy ranking
H3.evidence: Pixel-space H3 falsified (rho=-0.20, p=0.68); this was underpowered (100 samples, 3072-D). Feature-space NC_2 not yet computed. Requires 200-epoch ResNet-18 checkpoint from Tier 1 full.

H4.name: Flip-first ordering outperforms conventional Crop-first in at least 2/4 blocks (corrected DPI prediction)
H4.evidence: Flip→Crop→CJ wins in 2/4 blocks including highest-spread ViT/CIFAR-10. Corrected DPI prediction (Flip-first, not CJ-first from prior proposal) is consistent with pilot winner.

H5b.name: Interleaved P->G category ordering outperforms all-geometric-first in at least 3/4 blocks (paired t-test across 5 seeds)
H5b.evidence: 9.01% spread (interleaved_PG vs all_geo_first) in 1 seed, 5k subset, 10 epochs. Flagged as early-training artifact risk. Tier 2 confirmation pilot required before full Tier 2 investment.
H5b.gate: tier2_confirmation_pilot (pass criterion: spread > 1% in at least 1 seed)

H6.name: Inverted-U: M9 spread > M5 AND M9 spread > M14 (quadratic regression, negative quadratic term significant)
H6.evidence: M5=0.35%, M9=0.88%, M14=0.00% (1 seed, 10 epochs). M14 zero-spread is suspicious (identical to 3 decimal places). Needs 5-seed verification.

next_actions_priority.action: Run Tier 2 confirmation pilot (immediate gate decision)
next_actions_priority.pass_criterion: interleaved_PG spread > 1% on ResNet-18/CIFAR-10 in at least 1 of 2 seeds at 30 epochs
next_actions_priority.consequence_if_fail: Redirect Tier 2 budget to additional Tier 1 analysis; 9.01% finding becomes 'early-training artifact' negative result

next_actions_priority.action: Launch full Tier 1 experiments in parallel (blocking for all downstream)
Run Tier 1 full statistical analysis after all 4 blocks complete
Run Tier 3 magnitude full (5 seeds, test H6 inverted-U, verify M14)
next_actions_priority.note: Use best/worst orderings from tier1_analysis_full, not pilot

next_actions_priority.action: Run Tier 4a feature-space NC computation (revised H3)
next_actions_priority.note: 10k samples, 1000 projections, 512-D embeddings; requires 200-epoch ResNet-18 checkpoint

next_actions_priority.action: Run full Tier 2 if confirmation pilot passes
Run final aggregation and generate paper-ready tables
next_actions_priority.output: exp/results/full/final_summary_full.json — this is the paper writing entry point

reasons: H1 preliminary confirmed in 2/4 interpretable blocks (RN18×CIFAR-100: 0.88%, ViT×CIFAR-10: 2.32%) — ordering effects are real
Revised hypotheses (H4 DPI corrected to Flip-first; H5b category interleaving; H6 inverted-U) are well-specified and testable
Feature-space NC_2 (revised H3) provides a principled path to recovering theoretical predictive power
Tier 2 9.01% signal is the most striking finding but requires confirmation pilot before full investment
cand_b activation condition not met (spread > 0.2% in interpretable blocks)
cand_c always-run as zero-cost secondary analysis at no additional GPU cost

risks.risk: Ordering effects disappear at 200 epochs (optimization absorbs early-training sensitivity)
risks.mitigation: Monitor per-epoch spread curves; if spread < 0.2% by epoch 50 in all blocks, reassess
Tier 2 confirmation pilot (30 epochs, 2 seeds) is the gate before full Tier 2 investment

risks.risk: Feature-space NC_2 also fails to predict accuracy ranking
risks.mitigation: Report both pixel-space (falsified) and feature-space rho; reframe theoretical contribution as 'negative result: ordering effects operate below static representation space level'

risks.risk: M14 zero-spread result is a numerical artifact
risks.mitigation: Verify with per-epoch training curves and additional seeds in Tier 3 full

risks.risk: ResNet-18×CIFAR-10 block remains near chance performance — degenerate at 200 epochs
risks.mitigation: Unlikely with full dataset (50k) at 200 epochs (should reach ~92%); if still degenerate, exclude and narrow claims to 3 interpretable blocks
Proof required before submission; acknowledged as deferred in proposal; not blocking experiments
Weakened directional claim adopted as mitigation; formal revision needed for camera-ready
